description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Checks that runs on push and pull request events for specific paths. The workflow has three jobs: test, check, and coveralls_finish. The test job runs on a matrix of OS and Python versions, checks out the code, sets up Python, and runs tests. The check job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, sets up Python, and runs unit tests, linting with flake8 and mypy, and uploads coverage to Coveralls. The coveralls_finish job runs after the check job and finishes the Coveralls workflow.
